sections.title: Standard dialogue after Tree Gnome Village
Once, after The Path of Glouphrie

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: Here, I think this belongs to you.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: Hello there. Any luck in the quest for Arposandra?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sort of. I think I've worked out where Arposandra is, but my attempt to enter didn't go well. There seems to be quite an extensive set of defences.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: Ah, that is a problem. I wish I could offer more help, but the Khazard Army already poses a major threat to us. We can't afford to split ourselves fighting two different enemies.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So we do nothing?

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: For now, I'm afraid so. Glouphrie is a foe that must be dealt with one day, but that day is not today.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: Here, I think this belongs to you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How are things here?

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: I fear the war against the Khazard Army is set to outlive us all. We keep making progress, but for every foe we defeat, Khazard sends two more.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: Still, we thankfully haven't had any more Glouphrie problems at least.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's good to hear. All the best.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: Here, I think this belongs to you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again, Bolren.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: Hello there. It's good to see you again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How are things here?

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: Those Khazard troops continue to be a menace, but things are much better now. All thanks to you, of course.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: Congratulations, human!

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: Thank you. I don't have any gnome cooks here. I should really do something about that.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: You must have had to travel a long way to get this to me. Here's a little something extra as a tip.
